title: Hell or High Water
overview: A divorced father and his ex-con brother rob branches of the bank threatening to foreclose on their family land, chased by a Texas Ranger on the edge of retirement.

title: No Country for Old Men
overview: A hunter stumbles on a drug deal gone wrong and takes off with two million dollars, drawing a relentless killer and a weary sheriff into a bloody chase across West Texas.

title: Wind River
overview: A veteran tracker and a rookie FBI agent investigate the death of a young woman on a Wyoming reservation buried deep in the snow.

title: Tombstone
overview: Wyatt Earp and his brothers try to settle into business in Tombstone, Arizona, but the outlaw Cowboys force them and Doc Holliday into a deadly showdown.

title: Sicario
overview: An idealistic FBI agent is enlisted by a shadowy government task force to bring down a Mexican drug cartel leader along the border.

title: Slow West
overview: A young Scottish man travels across the American frontier in search of the woman he loves, joined by a mysterious drifter with his own agenda.

title: Talladega Nights: The Ballad of Ricky Bobby
overview: A dim-witted NASCAR star sees his career collapse when a flamboyant French Formula One driver arrives to challenge him for the checkered flag.

title: Step Brothers
overview: Two grown, spoiled men become stepbrothers when their single parents marry, and their childish rivalry threatens to tear the household apart.

title: The Nice Guys
overview: A mismatched pair of private eyes investigate the apparent suicide of a fading porn star in 1970s Los Angeles and stumble onto a wide-reaching conspiracy.

title: Hacksaw Ridge
overview: The true story of Desmond Doss, a combat medic who refused to carry a weapon and saved dozens of men at the Battle of Okinawa without firing a shot.

title: Django Unchained
overview: A freed slave teams with a German bounty hunter to rescue his wife from a brutal Mississippi plantation owner.

title: True Grit
overview: A stubborn teenage girl hires a hard-drinking U.S. Marshal to track down the outlaw who murdered her father.

title: The Hateful Eight
overview: Trapped by a blizzard, a bounty hunter and his prisoner take shelter in a stagecoach stopover with a group of strangers who may not be who they claim.

title: Uncut Gems
overview: A charismatic New York jeweler makes a series of high-stakes bets that could lead to the score of a lifetime or ruin.

title: John Wick
overview: An ex-hitman comes out of retirement to hunt down the gangsters who took everything from him.

title: The Wolf of Wall Street
overview: A New York stockbroker builds a fortune through fraud and corruption, drowning in excess before it all comes crashing down.

title: Prisoners
overview: When his daughter and her friend go missing, a desperate father takes the investigation into his own hands as a detective races to find them.

title: Hot Fuzz
overview: A by-the-book London cop is transferred to a sleepy village where a string of grisly accidents turns out to be anything but.

title: The Dark Knight
overview: Batman faces the Joker, a criminal mastermind bent on plunging Gotham City into chaos and testing the limits of the hero's principles.

title: The Assassination of Jesse James by the Coward Robert Ford
overview: The final months of the outlaw Jesse James, told through his uneasy friendship with the young Robert Ford who idolizes and ultimately betrays him.

title: The Departed
overview: An undercover cop and a mole in the police force race to identify each other while infiltrating an Irish gang in South Boston.

title: Brokeback Mountain
overview: Two ranch hands in Wyoming forge a complicated and enduring bond over decades on and off the mountain.
